name: It's a Snap!
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F.
2. Grease cookie sheets.
3. Beat egg whites in a mixer bowl at medium speed until frothy.
4. Add cream of tartar and beat until soft peaks form.
5. Add sugar, 2 tablespoons at a time, beating for 30 seconds after each addition.
6. At high speed, beat until stiff, about 1 minute more.
7. Beat in vanilla extract, ginger, and cinnamon.
8. Gently fold in the cookie crumbs.
9. Drop by teaspoonsful onto prepared cookie sheets.
10. Bake for 45 minutes or until dry to the touch.
11. Turn off oven and let meringues cool in the oven for 2 hours.
Makes 20 cookies.
